description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single stage called tests. Add a python2.7 job that uses the python:2.7 Docker image, runs pip install -r dev_requirements.txt in before_script and then executes nosetests --with-coverage --cover-package=pyOutlook. Add a python3.5 job that uses the python:3.5 image, runs the same pip install command before_script and then runs nosetests --with-coverage --cover-package=pyOutlook. Add a python3.6 job that uses the python:3.6 image, also runs pip install -r dev_requirements.txt before_script and then nosetests --with-coverage --cover-package=pyOutlook. No caches, artifacts, or conditional rules are defined.
